      "text": "wifſus atlifkuschus Laudis/ ko

(prohti) tohs Wihrus/ kas Kar-
ka-Wihri bija/ un tahs See-

beona bij atkak atweddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee gahje/ un apmet-
tahs eekſch tahs Mahjas-Wee-
tas Rinkama/ kas pee Betlemes
irr/ ka tee eetu/ un nahktu uhs
Egipti preekſch teem Kaldeeereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee bihjajahs preekſch
winneem/ tapehz ka Iſmaëls
Netanijus Dehls/ Gedalijn Ai-
kama Dehlu bij nokawis/ ko tas
Kehniſsch no Babeles pahr to
Semuni bij eezehtig.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Magguuns atlizzinahts/ ra-
nas Azzis muhs reds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja tas KUNGS t
Deews muhs gribbetu finn-
darricht to Zelfu/ uhs ko mu-
irr jastaiga/ un to Wahrdn/
muhs irr jadarra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Praweets Jere-
jus fazzija uhs teem: Es
klaufichu / Reds/ Es peelu-
schu to KUNGSU juhsn Dee-
pehz juhfeem Wahrddeim/ un n-
fus Wahrdus/ ko tas KUNG-
atbildehs/ darritchu es jums i-
namus/ es ne misturreſchu ju-
ne Wahrdn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee uhs Je-
mtju: Lui tas KUNGS muh-
Starpa weens ihſtens un x-
teefs Leeztineeks irraid/ ja me-
ne darrifim pehz wiſfu Wahrd-
ko tas KUNGS taws Dee-
mums pawehlehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jepſchu tas irr labę/ jo-
fauns/ mehs paklautifim t-
Balkfuei ta KUNGA muh-
Deewa/ pee ka mehs tewt ful-
tam/ ka mums fabbiſlahjahs-
lad mehs tai Balsi ta KUNG-
muhfa Deewa klaufifim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz defmits Deenah-
notikke ta KUNGA Wahrd-
uhs Jeremiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad aizinnaja wiſch Joa-
nann Kareifs Dehlu / un wiſfu-
Karra-Ahwerskus/ kas pee win-
na bija / un wiſus Laudis/ til-
labbi Masus ka Leelus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch fazzija uhs teem:
Ta. fakla tas KUNGS/ tas-
"
